body.title: WorkflowD: plan reasoning workflow
body.result: WorkflowD_Plan: numbered steps + risks + first step extraction. ActionPlan output struct. 9 tests.
body.description: WorkflowD_Plan — peer conversation to plan a multi-step action. Same pattern as WorkflowA. Opening: state the goal + constraints. Workflow steps: decompose, identify risks, sequence. Output: ActionPlan(goal, steps, risks, first_step). Sub-ticket of #436.
